en.extract:
The silver-backed needletail (Hirundapus cochinchinensis) is a species of swift in the family Apodidae.
It is found in Southeast Asia, Sumatra, Java and Taiwan.  It is a vagrant to Christmas Island.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests.

The '''silver-backed needletail''' ('''''Hirundapus cochinchinensis''''') is a species of [[Swift (bird)|swift]] in the family [[Apodidae]].
It is found in Southeast Asia, [[Sumatra]], [[Java]] and [[Taiwan]].  It is a vagrant to [[Christmas Island]].
Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s.
